summary: Cross-Provider Reconciliation Engine - Full E2E Testing Complete. Backend: 22/22 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working. Engine detects 6 mismatch types (missing_reservation, ghost_reservation, amount_mismatch, date_conflict, status_conflict, duplicate_reservation). Auto-resolution and idempotency verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 - unrelated to reconciliation, pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Reconciliation router properly implements all 11 endpoints with tenant isolation
Comparison engine correctly detects 6 mismatch types with proper severity mapping
Auto-resolver rules: missing_reservation/duplicate_event → auto-resolved, amount_mismatch/date_conflict/status_conflict → manual review required
Idempotency: duplicate case prevention working via external_reservation_id + case_type + status check
Snapshot collectors are MOCKED stubs - run-with-snapshots endpoint required for testing
Frontend Reconciliation tab displays all elements: Engine controls, Metrics, Provider breakdown, Filters, Cases with Ack/Resolve/Ignore buttons
seed_data_creation: Test cases created with prefixes RECON-TEST-, RECON-AUTO-, RECON-IDEMPOTENT-, RECON-ACTION-
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reconciliation engine fully tested. All 11 API endpoints working. Frontend at /data-model → Reconciliation tab. Dashboard shows 45 open cases (37 hotelrunner, 8 exely). Snapshot collectors are MOCKED stubs returning empty lists - use run-with-snapshots endpoint to inject test data. Auto-resolution working for missing_reservation type.

Reconciliation Tab.engine_controls: Run Reconciliation button with loader state
Reconciliation Tab.severity_display: Open Cases, Medium, High, Total Runs counts
Reconciliation Tab.mismatch_metrics: Missing Res, Ghost Res, Status Conflict, Amount Mismatch, Date Conflict, Duplicates
Reconciliation Tab.provider_breakdown: exely and hotelrunner with case counts
Reconciliation Tab.filters: Status, Severity, Type, Provider dropdowns with Apply button
Reconciliation Tab.cases_list: 56 cases displayed with provider badge, case_type, severity, status badges
Reconciliation Tab.action_buttons: Ack (open cases only), Resolve, Ignore buttons

mocked_apis_note: Snapshot collectors (collect_hotelrunner_snapshot, collect_exely_snapshot) return empty lists. Use run-with-snapshots endpoint to test with explicit provider snapshots.

mismatch_detection.missing_reservation: PASS - detected when provider has reservation PMS doesn't
mismatch_detection.ghost_reservation: PASS - detected when PMS has reservation provider doesn't

auto_resolution.amount_mismatch: NOT auto-resolved (requires manual review) as expected

reconciliation_test_results.idempotency: PASS - second run with same snapshots skips duplicates
